status: Fixed in done-task mirror reconciliation lane
finding: `tasks import --write` on an already `done` task fails with `ATM_TASKS_IMPORT_DONE_REQUIRES_REOPEN`, and `tasks import --write --force` requires an emergency approval lane (`ATM_EMERGENCY_LANE_APPROVAL_REQUIRED`). After cross-repo planning close updates 3KLife frontmatter, target operators cannot cleanly re-import planning mirror metadata to clear residue without reopening or emergency override.
expectedBehavior: Provide a governed read-only reconciliation import for done tasks that updates planning mirror fields without mutating delivery scope, or let `taskflow close` write authoritative mirror metadata back into the target ledger when planning commits succeed.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by adding `tasks import --write --reconcile-mirror`, which refreshes planning/source metadata for existing done tasks while preserving `status: done`, closure/provenance fields, and active delivery state. Residue recovery now recommends `--reconcile-mirror` instead of emergency `--force`. Verification: `node --strip-types packages/cli/src/commands/tasks/__tests__/import-orchestrator.spec.ts` covers a done ledger reconciliation, and `node --strip-types packages/cli/src/commands/tasks/__tests__/residue-diagnostics.test.ts` passes with the updated recovery command.
followUp: Keep `--reconcile-mirror` separate from `--force`, `--reopen`, and `--reset-open`; broader taskflow close exit semantics remain tracked by `ATM-BUG-2026-07-10-078`.
